taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Engineering, Data Engineer
core_skills: Silicon design, Data analytics, Engineering program support, Pre-silicon design metrics, SQL
skill_match_scores: Silicon design:0.0, Data analytics:1.0, Engineering program support:0.0, Pre-silicon design metrics:0.0, SQL:1.0
must_have_quals: Relevant experience in silicon design, data analytics, or engineering program support, Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills with excellent attention to details, Self-motivation and commitment to meeting deadlines, Creativity and innovation, Excellent verbal and written communication skills, Teamwork skills
preferred_quals: Ability to work with large, complex data sets and database building, Advanced Proficiency in SQL (Structured Query Language): Expertise in writing and optimizing complex queries, stored procedures, joins, and views to extract and transform data efficiently from relational databases (e.g., PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MySQL), Skilled in using programming languages like Python (with libraries like Pandas and NumPy) or R to identify inconsistencies, handle missing values, reshape, merge, and clean terabytes of raw data for analysis, Exceptional analytical and data processing skills using tools like PowerBI, SQL, MS Project/Excel, Knowledge of VLSI design concepts & tradeoffs, Familiar with programming languages such as Perl, C, tcl, etc, Basic understanding of computer architecture, Strong communication and interpersonal skills
core_responsibilities: Responsible for driving business processes and analytics that enable effective and efficient engineering of CPUs, Design, maintain & publish reports, and dashboards utilized as a standard for the engineering team, Partner and collaborate with stakeholders to inform development and enable program evaluation of design quality and schedule, Drive adoption and operational rigor across the organization through gap analysis and proactive & creative problem solving
job_summary: AMD is a leader in computing products, dedicated to innovation and collaboration. They are seeking a highly motivated professional to design, develop, and deploy pre-silicon design metrics for tracking CPU engineering progress, collaborating with program management and engineering leadership.
